item.title: Product archive layout 14
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
FAST AND POWERFUL PROCESSOR

Available new 7000 Series

Buy Now SUPPORT MESH TECHNOLOGY

Real Speed With 5Ghz Home Router

Buy Now

Hardware & Components

  • PC Components
    • Cases
    • Processors
    • Graphics Cards
    • Motherboards
    • Memory RAM
    • PC Power Supply Unit
    • SSD Drive
    • HDD Drive
  • Cooling
    • CPU Fan
    • Case Fan
    • Thermal Paste
  • Hardware & Other
    • Cables & Adapters
    • WIFI Routers
    • WIFI Sticks
    • Disc Drives

Pc Components

More Products Compare

4K Monitors £750.00 Logitech G735 Phenomenal performance for professionals A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the Add to wishlist Add to cart Quick view Hot Compare

SSD Drive £30.00 Rated 5.00 out of 5 The Big Oxmox advised her not to do so, because there were thousands of bad Commas, wild Question Marks and Add to wishlist Add to cart Quick view Compare

Ailink Aluminium Connector

Cables & Adapters £40.00 The Big Oxmox advised her not to do so, because there were thousands of bad Commas, wild Question Marks and Add to wishlist Add to cart Quick view Hot Compare

Alogic Ultra Mini USB

Card Readers £50.00 Rated 5.00 out of 5 Logitech G735 Phenomenal performance for professionals A small river named Duden flows by their place and supplies it with the Add to wishlist Add to cart Quick view

Online store of household appliances and electronics

Then the question arises: where’s the content? Not there yet? That’s not so bad, there’s dummy copy to the rescue. But worse, what if the fish doesn’t fit in the can, the foot’s to big for the boot? Or to small? To short sentences, to many headings, images too large for the proposed design, or too small, or they fit in but it looks iffy for reasons.

A client that's unhappy for a reason is a problem, a client that's unhappy though he or her can't quite put a finger on it is worse. Chances are there wasn't collaboration, communication, and checkpoints, there wasn't a process agreed upon or specified with the granularity required. It's content strategy gone awry right from the start. If that's what you think how bout the other way around? How can you evaluate content without design? No typography, no colors, no layout, no styles, all those things that convey the important signals that go beyond the mere textual, hierarchies of information, weight, emphasis, oblique stresses, priorities, all those subtle cues that also have visual and emotional appeal to the reader.

Read More

Recently Viewed

fa-chevron-right","library":"fa-solid"},"icon_type":"image","image":{"url":"http:\/\/dummy.xtemos.com\/woodmart2\/mega-electronics-elementor\/wp-content\/uploads\/sites\/8\/2023\/01\/chevron-right-primary.svg","id":9045,"alt":"","source":"library"},"image_size":"custom","image_custom_dimension":{"width":"14","height":"14"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"wd_button"}],"isInner":true},{"id":"a25722c","elType":"widget","settings":{"taxonomies":[],"columns":{"unit":"px","size":5,"sizes":[]},"items_per_page":5,"scroll_y":-80,"products_with_background":"1","products_background":"#FFFFFF","columns_tablet":{"unit":"px","size":3,"sizes":[]},"sync_parent_id":"wd_65674da9b031a","columns_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":2,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"wd_products"}],"isInner":false},{"id":"12cc03e","elType":"container","settings":{"background_background":"classic","background_color":"#FAFAFA","border_radius":{"unit":"px","top":"10","right":"10","bottom":"10","left":"10","isLinked":true},"padding":{"unit":"px","top":"20","right":"20","bottom":"20","left":"20","isLinked":true},"flex_gap":{"size":null,"column":"","row":"","unit":"px","isLinked":true},"container_sticky_offset":50,"scroll_y":-80,"wd_collapsible_content_height":{"unit":"px","size":220,"sizes":[]},"wd_collapsible_content_fade_out_color":"#FFFFFF","margin":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"30","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[{"id":"76f6f24","elType":"container","settings":{"container_sticky_offset":50,"scroll_y":-80,"wd_collapsible_content_switcher":"collapsible-content","wd_collapsible_content_height":{"unit":"px","size":214,"sizes":[]},"wd_collapsible_content_fade_out_color":"#FAFAFA"},"elements":[{"id":"cb43ff5","elType":"widget","settings":{"subtitle":"","title":"Online store of household appliances and electronics","after_title":"","align":"left","title_typography_typography":"custom","title_typography_font_size":{"unit":"px","size":26,"sizes":[]},"title_typography_font_size_tablet":{"unit":"px","size":22,"sizes":[]},"title_typography_font_size_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":18,"sizes":[]},"scroll_y":-80},"elements":[],"widgetType":"wd_title"},{"id":"25bb673","elType":"widget","settings":{"text":"<p>Then the question arises: where\u2019s the content? Not there yet? That\u2019s not so bad, there\u2019s dummy copy to the rescue. But worse, what if the fish doesn\u2019t fit in the can, the foot\u2019s to big for the boot? Or to small? To short sentences, to many headings, images too large for the proposed design, or too small, or they fit in but it looks iffy for reasons.<\/p><p>A client that's unhappy for a reason is a problem, a client that's unhappy though he or her can't quite put a finger on it is worse. Chances are there wasn't collaboration, communication, and checkpoints, there wasn't a process agreed upon or specified with the granularity required. It's content strategy gone awry right from the start. If that's what you think how bout the other way around? How can you evaluate content without design? No typography, no colors, no layout, no styles, all those things that convey the important signals that go beyond the mere textual, hierarchies of information, weight, emphasis, oblique stresses, priorities, all those subtle cues that also have visual and emotional appeal to the reader.<\/p>","typography_font_size":{"unit":"px","size":16,"sizes":[]},"typography_font_size_tablet":{"unit":"px","size":14,"sizes":[]},"scroll_y":-80},"elements":[],"widgetType":"wd_text_block"},{"id":"756c4d3","elType":"widget","settings":{"text":"Read More","button_collapsible_content":"yes","size":"small","shape":"semi-round","align":"left","scroll_y":-80,"icon":{"value":"fas fa-chevron-down","library":"fa-solid"},"icon_type":"image","image":{"url":"http:\/\/dummy.xtemos.com\/woodmart2\/mega-electronics-elementor\/wp-content\/uploads\/sites\/8\/2023\/01\/chevron-down-black.svg","id":9044,"alt":"","source":"library"},"image_size":"custom","image_custom_dimension":{"width":"14","height":"14"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"wd_button"}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":false},{"id":"26fcad4","elType":"container","settings":{"flex_gap":{"size":null,"column":"","row":"","unit":"px","isLinked":true},"container_sticky_offset":50,"scroll_y":-80},"elements":[{"id":"05aa33a","elType":"widget","settings":{"element_title":"Recently Viewed","post_type":"recently_viewed","ajax_recently_viewed":"yes","title_typography_typography":"custom","title_typography_font_size_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":20,"sizes":[]},"scroll_y":-80,"products_with_background":"1","products_background":"#FAFAFA","product_hover":"small","img_size":"custom","img_size_custom":{"width":"64","height":"64"},"grid_gallery":"no","layout":"carousel","slides_per_view":{"unit":"px","size":5,"sizes":[]},"slides_per_view_mobile":{"unit":"px","size":1,"sizes":[]},"sync_parent_id":"wd_65674da9b031a","_margin":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"30","left":"0","isLinked":false}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"wd_products"}],"isInner":false}]
